title: Neelangaraiyil Lyrics Pulivaal Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Neelangaraiyil
Singer(s): Karthik, Shreya Ghosal
Music : N.R.Raghurathan
Movie: Pulivaal

Neelangaraiyil kaanaanguruvi
thaanaa thavikkudhey.
Vaanam thirandhu vaiyyam kadandhu
parapom kaatriley.

Udambilirundhu usura mattum
uruvi uruvi edukkadhey.
Maasam maasam diesel vilaipola
aasa paasam yethaadhey.

Podava thuvaikkum thuraviyapola
muliyaa mulikkuren.
Pulivaal kudicha eliyappola
thaviyaa thavikkuren.

Neelangaraiyil kaanaanguruvi
thaanaa thavikkudhey.
Vaanam thirandhu vaiyyam kadandhu
parapom kaatriley.

Pattaa potta thanga katti
pattaam poochi pota kutti
oththupogum kadhali yellaam
fifty fifty pondaati.

Kanni ponna oramgatti
kannakilli kanna katti
kadhal pannum ponna kutti
yetti nillu naan getti..

Kadhal erumbu oorum podhu
kallum kooda theyumey.
DHooram paarthu nindra penmai
thozhil vandhu saayumey

Nee thoda thoda uchcham thala kodhikkudhey
viral pada pada ullangal kulirudhu
ne sandakaari aagum podhu padharudhu
en mandakulla natchathiram sidharudhu.

Pulivaal kudicha eliyappola
thaviyaa thavikkuren.
Podava thuvaikkum thuraviyapola
muliyaa mulikkuren. ........(Neelangaraiyil)

Cellphone mozhi pesi pesi
chinna ponna kedukkadhey.
noolaampada noolakatti
koyil thera illukkaadhey.

Vellakaran pogumpodhey
vetkam kooda poye poche
kaalam ippo high tech aaache
kaiyya vittu pogadhey.

Pengal konda aayaellaam fridge-il
vaitha aaple pola
aangal konda aasa ellaam
viyilil vaitha vennai pola

Nee vara vara vakkilukku padikkura
nee vadham vadham panni jeyikkura
nee muttaalunu nambavachi nadikkura
un mutta kannil rettamuyal thudikkura

Podava thuvaikkum thuraviyapola
muliyaa mulikkuren.
Pulivaal kudicha eliyappola
thaviyaa thavikkuren. ...(Neelangaraiyil )

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Neelangaraiyil?

The song conveys themes of love and longing, evoking a sense of nostalgia and romance.

What is the plot context of the movie Pulivaal?

The movie revolves around relationships and the complexities of love, making this song a perfect fit for its narrative.

Who are the singers of Neelangaraiyil?

The song features the talented voices of Karthik and Shreya Ghoshal.

Who composed the music for Pulivaal?

The music for the movie was composed by N. R. Raghunanthan.

When was Neelangaraiyil released?

The song was released on January 6, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Neelangaraiyil, the characters express their deep feelings for each other, reflecting the romantic essence of the movie Pulivaal. The soothing melody, combined with the heartfelt lyrics, evokes a sense of nostalgia and longing. This duet beautifully captures the emotions of love, making it a standout track in the film's soundtrack. The collaboration between Karthik and Shreya Ghoshal adds a unique charm, resonating with listeners and enhancing the film's romantic narrative.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Neelangaraiyil from the movie Pulivaal is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of romance. With Karthik's soulful voice harmonizing with Shreya Ghoshal's enchanting vocals, this song creates an unforgettable atmosphere. The unique collaboration between these talented artists, combined with N. R. Raghunanthan's captivating music, makes it a must-listen for all music lovers.
stanzaMeanings: In the blue sky, the bird is flying freely. We will open the sky and cross the world, flying with the wind.
Don't just take the breath from the body. Every month, like the price of diesel, desires and attachments don't fade away.
Like a cloth that is washed, I will shine. Like a tiger that drinks water, I will leap forward.
In the blue sky, the bird is flying freely. We will open the sky and cross the world, flying with the wind.
When a gold chain is worn, a small insect will fly away. All the girls are like fifty-fifty wives.
The beautiful girl is like a parrot, and when she loves, she becomes a little girl. I will catch her and hold her tight.
When love is like a fire, even stones will melt. Looking from a distance, the woman’s work will come to an end.
You are slowly getting angry, and your fingers are getting cold. When you are in trouble, my star will shine in your mind.
Like a tiger that drinks water, I will leap forward. Like a cloth that is washed, I will shine. ...(In the blue sky)
When talking on the cellphone, don't try to catch the little girl. Don't let the thread of the world break.
When the white man leaves, the fear also goes away. Now everything is high-tech, don't let your hands go.
All the girls are like things kept in the fridge, and their desires are like butter kept in the sky.
You keep coming to the door, studying the words. You keep winning with your words, and your eyes are like a butterfly fluttering.
Like a cloth that is washed, I will shine. Like a tiger that drinks water, I will leap forward. ...(In the blue sky)
